_comment: Source-of-truth manifest. The slicer (filament.py) reads this, slices each STL once, and writes ../src/lib/data/parts.generated.json plus thumbnails and downloadable STL copies. color_role: 'frame'|'core'|'any' (user picks a color) or 'fixed' (locked, see fixed_color). quantities are per ONE of each section. A machine = 1 feeder + 1 interface-top + 1 interface-bottom + N x layer. See PARTS_CONTEXT.md.

parts.name: Frame crossbeam
parts.notes: Onshape: combined_internal_bracket. One between each of the 6 frame sections.

parts.name: Frame 90° bracket
parts.notes: Onshape: inner_90_bracket. Two per frame section.
